disclaimer: This list of conditions and medicines is reference information only - names to help you record what you have been prescribed. It is NOT medical advice and does NOT include dosages or instructions. It may be incomplete or contain errors. Always follow the guidance of your doctor or pharmacist. Never start, stop, or change a medication based on this app.
